turns.content:
## Save-file compatibility policy

### Why this must be decided now

Existing player saves contain the old schema, so the release path determines whether users can load them.

### Recommended: A - versioned migration

Read the saved version and transform it to the current schema before gameplay starts. This preserves existing saves while keeping one runtime representation.

### Alternative: B - breaking replacement

Discard old saves at upgrade time. This reduces migration code but loses player progress.

### Your decision

Use A, or choose B?
